title: helianthemum cinereum var. paui
intro: Helianthemum cinereum var. paui, also known as rockrose, is a type of flowering plant in the Cistaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing potential health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and reduced risk of certain diseases. Rockrose can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
